achievements.description: Kill all the 5 bone archers at Sandstorm Fort!

achievements.title: Destroyer of Urns: Rank I
achievements.description: Destroy most of the urns at Sandstorm Fort.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Destroyer of Urns: Rank II
achievements.description: Destroy most of the urns at Sandstorm Fort and in the Valley of Death.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Destroyer of Urns: Rank III
achievements.description: Destroy most of the urns at Battle Hill, The Raging Thunder Canyon and at the Ambush below the water.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Destroyer of Urns: Rank IV
achievements.description: Destroy most of the urns at the castle in the air and in the wasteland.
achievements.author: Wimpy
